### Server-Side logic

At the server, we are doing the following steps: - Form the
coalitions. - First, construct the weighted undirected graph ℊ. -
Second, pass this graph to the louvian algorithm to get the
communities. - aggregate based on the equations stated in the next
cells.

First, model similrity is compared using the norm of the difference
between the two models as follows:
Sim<sub>head </sub>(**w**<sub>*k*</sub>, **w**<sub>ℓ</sub>) = ∥**w**<sub>*k*</sub> − **w**<sub>ℓ</sub>∥,

After some exprimentation, we changed the above similarity to be the
cosine similarity between the response of the models when given an
arbitrary input. This is because the model weights can be different but
the response can be similar.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/fedai/blob/main/fedai/servers/sfmtl.py#L63"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### SFMTLServer.model_similarity

``` python

def model_similarity(
    h1, h2, model1, model2
):

```

We compare the embedding closeness using cosine similiairy.

$$\operatorname{Sim}\_{\mathrm{repr}}(k, \ell) = \cos(\Omega) = \frac{\mathbf{h}\_k \cdot \mathbf{h}\_{\ell}}{\\\mathbf{h}\_k\\ \\\mathbf{h}\_{\ell}\\}$$

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/fedai/blob/main/fedai/servers/sfmtl.py#L109"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

``` python

def h_similarity(
    h1, h2, label_set, label_set2
):

```

We build a similarity graph using both the local represntation *h* and
the classification head *w* where similairty is defined as:
Sim  = ∑<sub>*i* ∈ *S*</sub>*α* ⋅ Sim<sub>head </sub>(*C*<sub>*j*</sub>) + (1 − *α*) ⋅ Sim<sub>repr</sub>(*C*<sub>*j*</sub>)

Now, we have a wighted graph, we nedd to form the coalitions (detecting
the communities). We do so by using the louvain method for graph
partitioning.

### Aggregation

The aggregation rule here is two-folds: - Representations are aggregated
as:
$$ h_c = \sum\_{k \in C\_{j}} \frac{\zeta_k}{\sum\_{k \in C\_{j}} \zeta_k}h_k$$
where *ζ* is the shapely value.

The Classification heads are aggregated as:
*w*<sub>*k*</sub><sup>(*t* + 1)</sup> = *w*<sub>*k*, *R*</sub><sup>(*t*)</sup> − *λ**η*<sub>2</sub>∑<sub>ℓ ∈ *C*<sub>*j*</sub></sub>*a*<sub>*k*, ℓ</sub>(*w*<sub>*k*, *R*</sub><sup>(*t*)</sup> − *w*<sub>ℓ, *R*</sub><sup>(*t*)</sup>)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/fedai/blob/main/fedai/servers/sfmtl.py#L285"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>
